name: wai-yaml-ld
description: Static GraphQL-style API builder for WAI YAML-LD datasets

scripts.codespace:hint: echo 'WAI static API endpoints:' && echo '  https://mgifford.github.io/wai-yaml-ld/api/v1/sc/all.json' && echo '  https://mgifford.github.io/wai-yaml-ld/api/v1/introspection.json' && echo 'Local build outputs:' && echo '  dist/api/v1/sc/all.json' && echo '  dist/api/v1/introspection.json'
